arts.ttl: Manchester United make more unwanted history after Bournemouth defeat
arts.sum: The festive season might be here, but there’s little to be cheerful about at Manchester United. Ruben Amorim’s side were beaten 3-0 by Bournemouth in the Premier League on Sunday, a result that leaves the club mired in the bottom half. arts.ttl: Martinez insists Man United ‘love’ pressure despite Bournemouth defeat
arts.sum: Lisandro Martinez has insisted Manchester United ‘love’ the pressure of expectation despite a damaging defeat to Bournemouth at Old Trafford. United were beaten 3-0 on home soil by the high-flying Cherries, in a result that leaves the Red Devils mired in the bottom half at Christmas. arts.ttl: Amorim 'Always expected' Man Utd job to be difficult.
arts.sum: Following a 3-0 loss to Bournemouth, Ruben Amorim says the Manchester United job is not more difficult than he expected before he arrived at Old Trafford.
